name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi

proof.text: Farmers with cultivable landholding up to 2 hectares are eligible.

details: Provides ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments.

proof.text: Requires completion of form 7/12 and crop notification within 48 hours of sowing.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)

proof.text: All farmers, tenant farmers, and sharecroppers are eligible.

details: Timely access to credit for farmers.
